top_signals.title: Families mourn victims of 2021 Atami mudslide
top_signals.summary: On July 3, 2021, heavy rain triggered a mudslide involving some 55,500 cubic meters of earth and sand, which destroyed over a hundred houses and other buildings, killing 28 people.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Murakami says his novels are ‘different’ from AI literature
top_signals.summary: When he is deeply focused on writing a story, characters suddenly show up, and "that's not something that comes out from analogy," he said, adding "AI probably can't do that."
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
